description: Schema for config/skills.yaml — MCP server connection configuration.

servers.description: List of MCP servers to connect to at startup.

actionRisk.description: Minimum autonomy score required to invoke tools from this server without explicit CEO approval.

server.description: An MCP server to connect to at startup. All tools discovered via tools/list are registered in the skill registry.

name.description: Unique identifier for this MCP server. Used in log messages and as a namespace prefix for discovered tool names.

transport.description: Transport type. 'stdio' spawns a local process; 'sse' connects to an HTTP MCP endpoint (uses StreamableHTTPClientTransport).

action_risk.description: Required. Action risk applied to all tools discovered from this server. No default — must be declared explicitly.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level for all tools from this server. Defaults to 'normal'.

timeout_ms.description: Per-invocation timeout in milliseconds for tools from this server. Defaults to 30000.

command.description: Required for stdio transport. The executable to spawn (e.g. 'npx', 'node', '/usr/bin/python').

args.description: Command-line arguments for the spawned process. Used with stdio transport only.

env.description: Extra environment variables to set in the spawned process. Used with stdio transport only.

headers.description: HTTP headers sent with every request to the MCP endpoint. Used with sse transport only. Useful for Authorization: Bearer <token>. Note: values are literal strings — no env-var interpolation is performed.

url.description: Required for sse transport. The HTTP MCP endpoint URL (e.g. https://bigquery.googleapis.com/mcp).
